title: Animal Science: How to Use the Wireless Video Connection  in Room 203
body: Windows laptop On the laptop’s keyboard, press the Windows key and the letter K at the same time. In the Connect menu bar that appears at the right side of your laptop’s screen, click on “Ansci-R203-Wireless-Presentation” In the PIN box, type in the 4-digit code on the projection screen. Click Connect. Mac laptop Set your laptop's Wi-Fi to connect to "Room 203 Ansci" Please see tech support if you do not have the password On the top bar of your Mac, click the "Control Center" icon and click on "Screen Mirroring"
